score_breakdown.evidence: 417/417 tests passing from pytest + coverage baseline run on 2026-02-26.
Security scanning exists in CI, but API-backed high-severity alert count is not yet wired into dashboard automation.
Docker smoke p95 endpoint latency is 25.955 ms and benchmark simulation p95 runtime is 0.263235 s.
Line coverage is 86.35 percent with CI gate at 82 percent.
Current generated fidelity reports in outputs show fail status and require remediation before promotion confidence.
Runbooks and SLO docs exist; dashboard automation and alert routing are still being hardened.
Release workflows, schema contracts, and milestone/epic tracking are now versioned in-repo.
Cross-language parity exists but broader external integration playbooks remain in progress.

risks.summary: Fidelity gate pass rate is currently 0 percent in generated report artifacts.
risks.mitigation: Prioritize EPIC-06 with trace-by-trace failure analysis and threshold/calibration remediation before any promotion claims.

risks.summary: Security high-severity counts are not machine-ingested into KPI snapshots yet.
risks.mitigation: Add automated security export ingestion into the KPI generation workflow for milestone reviews.

actions.description: Raise fidelity gate pass rate from 0 percent to >= 98 percent on reference suite.
Automate KPI snapshot generation from CI evidence artifacts.
Expose open high-severity vulnerability counts in a consumable JSON artifact for governance dashboards.

notes: Baseline snapshot generated on 2026-02-26 from local CI-equivalent test run and existing benchmark/smoke artifacts.
